creator: mvh@netcom.com
text:
I run 'popper' with logging, and after the last round of patches,
I see stuff like:

Jun 29 07:32:14 mikey popper[12518]: Stats: somebody 1 36555 0 -32
Jun 29 07:36:33 mikey popper[12547]: Stats: somebody2 4 312465 0 -144

all over the place.

How-To-Repeat: run the latest 'popper', check the logs
